use_cases: Page-level background with subtle grid pattern and color accent for landing pages
Decorative background for product or portfolio showcases
Subtle visual layer for SaaS dashboards and app interfaces
ai_summary: A decorative background component featuring a white grid pattern with light gray lines and a radial gradient accent in purple/lavender. This atomic snippet provides subtle visual depth and interest for page backgrounds without requiring interactions or animations. Commonly used in landing pages, portfolios, and product showcases across various industries.
